commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: These things the Saviour Himself seals when He says: "To you it is given to know the mysteries of the kingdom of heaven."

commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Such as are out of the Church, though they both hear and read, they cannot understand. (Ven. Bede, in Chap. iv, Mark.)
